title: Disconnected Record Set
text: Disconnected Record Set Determines whether the entity node in the DTD tree represents a disconnected record set. Valid values are True or False (default). It True , the Status , ID , and Checksum (CRC) properties are all set to True . XML is typically used to define disconnected record sets. By selecting these attributes, you enable Uniface to reconnect disconnected occurrences, using retrieve/reconnect I invented property name, values and default. This needs to b revisited with the new UI. Applies To DTD Entity Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
